message:
feat(mux): fix file transfer issues and add transfer monitor UI

Web Client Fixes:
- Fix second download getting stuck by closing WebSocket after ALL transfers complete
- Prevent double-submission in transfer dialog with isSubmitting guard
- Add DownloadProgressDialog component for tracking active/completed transfers
- Fix onTransferComplete callback being set on wrong object (critical bug)
- Add transfer monitor auto-close when opening upload/download dialog
- Add "Clear from list" button for completed transfers
- Add space in Clear button: "Clear (3.1MB)"
- Reset window title when transfer monitor is hidden
- Clear completed transfers when clearing storage
- Add .gitignore checkbox to transfer dialog

Backend Fixes:
- Improve goroutine runtime stability and queue management
- Add transfer resume support and error handling
- Enhance file transfer protocol with progress tracking
- Add proper cleanup for completed transfers

Key Behavioral Changes:
- File WebSocket now closes only when activeTransfers.size === 0
- Supports multiple concurrent downloads without connection conflicts
- Transfer dialog resets isSubmitting flag when reopening
- OPFS cache cleared after successful downloads
